title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 07 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 07 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 07 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 07/03/2025
Today, iron ore futures fluctuated repeatedly, with the most-traded I2505 contract finally closing at 774 yuan/mt, up 0.19%for the day. Traders remained less motivated to sell; steel mills conducted limited restocking for rigid demand; and market transaction sentiment was sluggish. In Shandong, mainstream transaction prices for PB fines were around 773-777 yuan/mt, basically stable compared to yesterday; in Tangshan, According to SMM port inventory data, port arrivals slightly declined this week.
